headline: A Fresh Look At Aflac (AFL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Aflac stock: recent performance snapshot Aflac (AFL) has been on many investors’ radars after a recent stretch of mixed returns, including a decline of about 5% over the past month and a modest gain over the past year. See our latest analysis for Aflac. At a share price of $108.71, Aflac’s recent 1 month share price return of around a 5% decline contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of 2.46% and a 5 year total shareholder return of 141.15%, suggesting that shorter term momentum has...
